About Nicole

The artist behind the brand

Nicole Vendettoli has built her reputation one bride at a time. Her specialty is natural, enhanced makeup — brides who rarely wear makeup in everyday life walk out of her chair looking breathtaking, not transformed.

What started as a solo practice has grown into a full bridal beauty company: a trusted team of artists and hair stylists, a physical location in Warwick, and access to the Blink to Beauty Bridal Suite. The business has evolved. The standard hasn't.

When you book Envy Beauty, you're booking into Nicole's world — her style, her eye, her team.

Book a Consultation

What We Offer

Every bride. Every detail.

01

Bridal Makeup

Nicole's signature natural, enhanced style. Ideal for brides who want to look like themselves at their most luminous — elevated, not overdone.

02

Hair Services

A full team of stylists available for your wedding day. Book hair only, makeup only, or both — we coordinate everything seamlessly.

03

Bridal Parties

Large parties accommodated with ease. Multiple artists and stylists available. No minimum required outside of peak season (June–October).

04

On-Location

We travel throughout Rhode Island and selectively into Massachusetts. We know the venues, the light, the timing. You focus on your day.

05

Trials & Studio

Visit our Warwick studio for your trial. See the space, meet the team, and walk out knowing exactly what your wedding morning will feel like.

06

Makeup Lessons

One-on-one instruction at our studio for brides, bridesmaids, or anyone looking to build confidence with makeup before the big day.

Blink to Beauty

The Bridal Suite experience.

Our location at 612 Post Road in Warwick is home to the Blink to Beauty Bridal Suite — a dedicated getting-ready space available to our clients. More than a chair and a mirror. A room designed for the morning of.

  • Private getting-ready suite, beautifully appointed
  • Available to Envy Beauty clients by arrangement
  • 612 Post Road, Warwick, RI 02886
  • Separate brand, seamless experience
